<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, but the direct path downward from column C is blocked by lava at row 03 column C and row 04 column C. So I should move forward into the safe floor at row 02 column C to progress toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D, facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead is row 02 column E, which is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. The goal is below and to the right, but the cell at row 03 column D is safe floor, so I should turn right to face down toward that path.
</thought>
<action>

</action>

<thought>

</thought>

<thought>
